design_philosophy.description: A high-performance workspace for entrepreneurs. It blends the density of a financial terminal with the clean aesthetics of modern SaaS. White space is used for grouping, not just emptiness. Data is the hero.

usage_rules.headings: Use 'Manrope' for all H1-H6. Weights: 600 (Semibold) or 800 (ExtraBold). Tracking: tight (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use 'Inter' for paragraphs, labels, and UI text. Weights: 400 (Regular) or 500 (Medium).
usage_rules.data: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for prices, trend scores, dates, and IDs. This implies precision.

dashboard_grid.description: Bento-style grid with mixed span sizes.

landing_hero.structure: Centralized text with a large dashboard preview image tilting forward (3D transform).

product_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary-foreground border border-input hover:bg-secondary/80 shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-border shadow-card rounded-xl p-6 hover:shadow-card_hover transition-shadow duration-200
cards.product: group bg-white border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-200

badges.trend_high: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.trend_med: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.trend_low: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider

tables.header: text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase bg-secondary/50 font-semibold tracking-wider

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero background or side image

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to the head of 'index.html' immediately.
2. THEME: Implement the colors in 'tailwind.config.js' extending the theme. Do not just rely on Shadcn defaults.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component with a fixed sidebar and scrollable main content area. Use a 'LandingLayout' for public pages with a sticky glassmorphism header.
4. COMPONENTS: heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove the default heavy radiuses if they exist (keep to 0.5rem/8px). Ensure buttons have the 'Manrope' font weight 600.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts for the trend analysis. Style them with the 'primary' color (#4F46E5) for lines/bars and remove grid lines for a cleaner look.
6. TABLES: Ensure data tables have sticky headers and hoverable rows. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any column displaying currency or numerical scores.
7. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and product cards.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Do NOT center-align text in dashboard cards. Left align is better for scanning.
Use 24px-32px padding inside cards. Don't cram content.
Always add a 'transition-all duration-200' to interactive elements.
Never use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic product names (e.g., 'Portable Neck Fan', 'Magnetic Phone Mount').
